## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Architecture/design
- [ ] Parser
- [ ] Geometry
- [ ] Rendering
- [ ] Client
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Build/CI

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] Tests or validation notes are included where applicable.
- [ ] New dependencies or assets include license information.
- [ ] GPL-bound functionality remains optional and separated from the permissive core.
